data.title: Grayscale pushes for SEC approval on BNB ETF, offering regulated BNB exposure to US investors beyond BTC and Ether.
data.description: If authorized, the offering would grant American investors the opportunity to engage with regulated exposure to BNB without the necessity of directly possessing the token.

data.title: Inventor from Torrance creates AIR FRESHENER & DISINFECTING TABLET to deodorize and disinfect, aiming to improve cleanliness.
data.description: A resident of Torrance, California, shared that they developed the AIR FRESHENER & DISINFECTING TABLET to enhance the deodorizing and disinfecting process for clothing, personal items, vehicles, homes, and offices. The designer aimed for a discreet solution... The invention was conceptualized in Pittsburgh and announced on January 23, 2026, through PRNewswire.

data.title: Mobileye Global Inc. reported 9% decline in Q4 revenue to $446 million, missing analyst estimates. CEO discusses shift in focus towards Physical AI.
data.description: Mobileye Global Inc. (NASDAQ: MBLY) announced its fiscal fourth-quarter earnings which were in line with expectations. The company reported a 9% decrease in quarterly revenue to $446.000 million, surpassing analysts' consensus of $432.329 million. EyeQ volumes fell by 11% due to imbalances in demand and supply, resulting in lower inventory levels for Tier 1 customers by the end of 2025. The adjusted EPS stood at 6 cents, aligning with analysts' predictions. Mobileye's CEO, Prof. Amnon Shashua, expressed the company's goal to be a frontrunner in Physical AI for autonomous vehicles and humanoid robotics.

data.title: Dominion Energy declares quarterly dividend of 66.75 cents per share, payable on March 20, 2026. 392nd consecutive dividend.
data.description: The board of directors of Dominion Energy (NYSE: D) has announced a quarterly dividend of 66.75 cents per share of common stock. Shareholders of record at the close of business on Feb. 27, 2026, will receive the dividends on March 20, 2026. This marks the 392nd consecutive dividend paid by Dominion Energy or its predecessor company to common stockholders. The previous quarterly dividend was declared on Oct. 29, 2025.

data.title: WallStreetBets forum unveils 2026 Index with top 10 stocks picked by members, featuring mix of trillion-dollar titans and speculative growth plays. ASTS stock climbing.
data.description: The digital platform that made waves by triggering the GameStop Corp. (NYSE: GME) short squeeze on Wall Street is now focusing on a longer-term strategy. The WallStreetBets 2026 Index has been introduced, featuring a collection of 10 stocks chosen by members of Reddit's WallStreetBets forum. ASTS stock is also experiencing an upward trajectory. This new 2026 Index showcases a mix of established trillion-dollar companies and high-risk, high-reward growth stocks, signaling a shift towards more sophisticated investments for the future of technology. This development reflects the evolution of the group's investment approach from short-term speculative plays to forward-looking strategies. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: PMMI Pharma infographic reveals challenges and trends in pharmaceutical manufacturing. Growth and support crucial.
data.description: A recent study reveals that pharmaceutical manufacturers are encountering a rapidly expanding market and will require assistance from original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) and suppliers to address operational challenges and facilitate further growth. The pharmaceutical sector is currently undergoing a period of continuous growth, with the industry set to expand significantly. The research was conducted in Herndon, Virginia, and was announced on January 23, 2026. This growth presents a significant opportunity for pharmaceutical manufacturers to collaborate with OEMs and suppliers in order to navigate operational hurdles and support the industry's expansion.

data.title: IAPDA certification becomes integral in debt settlement industry as US consumers hold over $90,000 in personal debt.
data.description: In Boynton Beach, Florida, on January 23, 2026, the pressing issue of increasing personal debt among American consumers is highlighted. The demand for skilled debt settlement professionals has surged amidst record-high levels of debt. On average, each American now carries over $90,000 in personal debt.

data.title: Inventor from Staten Island creates A A DEVICE to prevent grease drips, reduce flareups while barbecuing.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 23, 2026, an inventor from Staten Island, NY, shared the inspiration behind creating a unique barbecue accessory. The inventor introduced the A A DEVICE, aiming to prevent grease from dripping onto burners and into the grill. This innovative design is projected to eliminate significant flareups while enhancing grilling experiences.

data.title: "ZERO Prostate Cancer organizes 2026 Veterans Action Convening to enhance care and outcomes for veterans in Arlington, VA."
data.description: In Alexandria, Virginia on January 23, 2026, ZERO Prostate Cancer (ZERO) disclosed details about the 2026 Veterans' Action Convening. This event aims to enhance prostate cancer care, support, and outcomes for veterans on a national level. Scheduled for January 27-28, 2026, in Arlington, Virginia, the convening will bring together a diverse range of stakeholders with a shared goal of improving the lives of veterans impacted by prostate cancer.

data.title: Celebrity stylist Marcus Blassingame joins ZERO Prostate Cancer to promote men's health through style and story.
data.description: In Alexandria, Virginia on January 23, 2026, a prominent organization known as ZERO Prostate Cancer announced the addition of Marcus Blassingame, a highly influential celebrity stylist in the fashion industry, as their latest ambassador. Blassingame is renowned for his role in defining the visual personas of numerous stars from various fields including music, cinema, TV, and athletics.

data.title: Ivalua named a Leader in 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Source-to-Pay Suites, evaluating solutions from 13 software.
data.description: Ivalua, a renowned company in spend management based in Redwood City, California, was recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner "Magic Quadrant for Source-to-Pay Suites." This prestigious ranking evaluated 13 software solutions in the Source-to-Pay (S2P) category. Ivalua's distinction highlights its strong position in the industry and signifies its excellence in providing comprehensive solutions for managing spending. The recognition further solidifies Ivalua's reputation as a global leader in the field.

data.title: Procter & Gamble beats Q2 earnings estimates with $1.88 EPS, misses on sales with $22.208B, expects sales rebound. EPS guidance at $6.83-$7.09 for fiscal 2026.
data.description: The Procter & Gamble Company (NYSE: PG) released its latest quarterly results, which showed mixed performance. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of $1.88 for the second quarter, surpassing analysts' expectations of $1.86. However, quarterly sales were slightly below projections at $22.208 billion, missing the Street's estimate of $22.282 billion. Procter & Gamble's CFO, Andre Schulten, expressed confidence in a sales recovery over the next six months following what he referred to as the "softest quarter of the year," as reported by Bloomberg. The company reiterated its fiscal 2026 adjusted EPS guidance of $6.83 to $7.09, compared to the consensus of $6.97. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Roofing expert in Knoxville discusses damage prevention tips for homeowners in HelloNation article.
data.description: In Knoxville, Tennessee, as of January 23, 2026, homeowners are being advised to learn how to identify and address signs of roofing damage early on to avoid significant costs. An article by HelloNation provides insights into the observed patterns of wear on roofs in Knoxville and offers guidance on what to look out for. By being proactive, residents can potentially save on repair expenses associated with their roofs.
